items.title: The Utah Jazz and Josh Okogie have agreed to a two-year, $12 million deal, including a team option for the second year, league sources told HoopsHype. Okogie is a noted defender who shot 38.5% from 3-point range last season. ESPN first on the deal. HoopsHype first on team option.
items.author: Michael Scotto
items.body_excerpt: The Utah Jazz and Josh Okogie have agreed to a two-year, $12 million deal, including a team option for the second year, league sources told HoopsHype. Okogie is a noted defender who shot 38.5% from 3-point range last season. ESPN first on the deal. HoopsHype first on team option.

items.title: Canada 110-84 over Puerto Rico.
items.author: Tony East
items.body_excerpt:
Canada 110-84 over Puerto Rico.

-Andrew Nembhard: 23 points on 9/11 shooting, 4 assists. Possibly best player on the court.
-Ethan Thompson: 14 points on 5/11 shooting, 4 assists.

items.title: Canada beats Puerto Rico, 110-84, in FIBA World Cup qualifying.
items.author: Blake Murphy
items.body_excerpt:
Canada beats Puerto Rico, 110-84, in FIBA World Cup qualifying.

Canada now 5-0, +95, with a final game Monday vs Jamaica in Hamilton. Records carry over to next round, so it all counts.

Looked/sounded like an awesome crowd on TV.
